outcomes.description: Expose a lightweight health probe that confirms the backend API process is running and responsive.

scenarios.scenario: Respond to backend health check request
scenarios.description: System receives GET / with no parameters, no authentication guard, and no service or database dependency. It immediately returns {"status": "ok", "message": "Backend API is running!"} with HTTP 200. No branches or error paths exist in the handler. Handler: read_root() in routes.py; router mounted at root with no prefix in main.py.

actions.description: Accepts GET / with no query parameters, no request body, and no authentication guard. Handler: read_root() defined at routes.py line 12. Router mounted at root with no prefix via app.include_router(router) in main.py.

Returns static JSON body {"status": "ok", "message": "Backend API is running!"} with HTTP 200. No database call, no service injection, no authentication required. Single unconditional return statement with hardcoded values.
